github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: Line 1: ≤50-char summary prefixed with ALL CAPS Conventional Commits: `FEAT:`|`FIX:`|`DOCS:`|`CHORE:`|`TEST:`|`SECURITY:`|`BREAKING:`. Line 2: blank. Lines 3+: full summary, each item starting with `-`. Prefix security items with `SECURITY:`. Prefix breaking changes (feature/interface/dependency) with `BREAKING:`.
